entry.title: How to send parameter values to SAC Data Action through Scripting
entry.content:
Hi

How to send parameter values to SAC Data Action from Story Filters.

I have updated parameters with fixed values in script for data action and it is working, But I am looking to get user selected values from Story Filter to pass DA parameters instead of hard coded values.

How to get user selected values from Story filter and pass to DA parameters.

Story Filters:

Please help. Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting- Anonymize Candidate Profile and Applications
entry.content:
Hi @DanDelSF & @Hermann_Britto 

Is this still something you are reviewing as a need in SAP SuccessFactors?

Our solution and company MeVitae have a long standing partnership and clients using our anonymization tool within their system. I'd be more than happy to chat with you to discuss this further and understand your needs / requirements. At a snapshot, we:

- Redact over 26+ parameters including gender, name, age etc
- Offer redaction permissions so hiring managers are the only redacted staff or all
- Reveal stage of your choice
- Anonymize candidate profile and resume (retaining format)

The Gold Standard in Anonymized Recruiting | Redefine Hiring

Have a review of our website first, feel free to message me and we can have a conversation at your convenience. 

Best,
Jack

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
Hi @AnnePetteroe ,

the new design adds a line break not only before and after each hyperlink as mentioned by Christian Bartels  but also before and after each word in bold and italic font. Most of the blogs are now not readable. Do you plan to fix this issue asap?

Thanks,
Olga.

entry.title: Manage Customer Line Items
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to see PO (Customer purchase order/reference number) in Manage Customer Line Items tile?

Thanks,

Erika

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms 2411 Released Features
entry.content:
Hello , I am also interested in that topic : display notification number, work order number in a dynamic form : can you send me the details ?

Best regards, 

Pierre-yves

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2205 Operation Mobile S...
entry.content:
Found this topic just now with a version 2405

Had the same issue . The status or workorder is not correctly downloaded(can be checked in the top of Workorder details page - you will see some ##  and technical names) and also the "My work" area is empty after delta sync(from initial sync everything is fine)

The solution is very simple - we noticed that the Offline configuration was not configured. So after generating DEST_SAM2405_PPROP through /MERP/CORE_OFFLINE_CONFIG_PROG

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASSET_MANAGER/d2e76ee96b6141c9bfc3afae96b7aa71/c556ade82b824c6b911333ab4dea7dd1.html

and uploading it to Offline section in SAM2405 in Mobile services the problem has gone. 

PS the version of app I assume doesnt matter. 

All good!

entry.title: Are you familiar with SAP IBP but wonder what SAP Supply Chain Control Tower is all about?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Mastering the main features and functions in SAP Supply Chain Control Tower learning journey.


Overview
 You will gain a solid understanding of the SAP Supply Chain Control Tower business processes and supporting functionality. The self-paced e-learning training is supplemented with hands-on exercises using the most recently released version of the SAP IBP cloud solution.

Learning objectives

  • ​Describe the standard planning areas in SAP IBP 
  • ​Introduce analytic stories, dashboards, and custom alerts functionality 
  • ​Explain the concept of Procedure Playbooks
  • ​Explain the concept and usage of Cases 
  • ​Explain Intelligent Visibility and Intelligent Visibility Profiles 
  • ​Setup navigation to other systems 
  • ​Explain navigation/integration of SAP Supply Chain Control Tower with, for example, SAP Ariba and Logistics Business Network and integration with geographical content 

Prerequisites

  • ​IBP1010 - Exploring Planning Processes in SAP IBP

  • IBP1020 - Exploring Tools & Features in SAP IBP

  • IBP2200 – Discovering SAP IBP for S&OP  

  • IBP2300 – Discovering the Main Configuration for SAP IBP 

  • IBP2400 - Discovering SAP IBP for Inventory Planning and Optimization  

  • IBP2500 - Discovering SAP Supply Chain Control Tower  

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

We appreciate your feedback to make sure we continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Susann

entry.title: Re: How can you create a Story Report that shows who has...
entry.content: The second option actually did the trick thank you! Still very surprised SAP hasn't really created some sort of template around this material yet.

entry.title: Re: How to find the actual distance for a Visit if OutOfR...
entry.content:
If anyone else is also looking for a solution to this, I’ve been in the same situation. After reviewing a lot of documentation and resources, I finally found the formula SAP uses to calculate the distance between the account's coordinates and the check-in location.

You can find the official reference in KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0003512883

This helped us better understand how the OutOfRangeCheckIn flag is determined and allowed us to build our own custom logic to retrieve the actual distance in meters.

Hope this saves you time!

entry.title: Get ready for the upcoming SAPA S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
SAP Business Suite empowers organizations to scale, innovate, and adapt faster than ever. SAP cloud ERP applications, SAP Business AI, and SAP Business Data Cloud come together to deliver exceptional business value — all powered by SAP Business Technology Platform.

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A , giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508 Early Release Series
takes place from 21.07.25 - 25.07.25!

 

Stay tuned for the detailed agenda and registration links coming soon!

 

_________________

Sign-up instructions:

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to register for the live sessions and to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up

As a customer:

Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:

  1. Navigate to the sign-up page and click on the “sign up” button.
  2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.
  3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue.
    This process may take up to 2 hours
  4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.

As a partner:
Partners with a valid SAP Universal ID, who are able to login to the Empowering SAP partners site, will be able to access the live sessions and recordings.

As an SAP internal:
Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge) by clicking on “access”.

Experiencing issues?
Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Edit SAP Success Factors Timeout Landing Page
entry.content:
When users Timeout they are presented with a page asking them to follow a link to log back in. I would like to edit this page and i cannot find an area in the admin centre where this is possible.

 

Does anybody know where or how to edit the landing page for when a user is timed out of the system?

entry.content: registered !!!

entry.title: Re: 🇲🇽 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Mexico City, Mexico)
entry.content: Registered !!

entry.title: ABAP for Cloud Development - ABAP Push Channel Applications
entry.content:
Latest SAP Documentation shows how to create ABAP Push Channel Applications. However, object type SAMC is not supported in ABAP Cloud so this cannot be used while working with ABAP for Cloud Development packages.

An SAP developer tutorial on AMC + ABAP Daemons almost matched our use-case, but the tutorial relies on an external  MQTT Broker (HiveMQ). While developing installable on-prem (clean core) ABAP add-ons, it is not logical to use an external MQTT Broker when AMC Applications work and would not require an external broker. I believe this will also be an issue for anyone running SAP BTP ABAP Environment that would like to make use of ABAP message channels.  

Is this a reasonable SAP Influence request and would there be some support from others in community for this functionality within ABAP Cloud? Please let me know if there is any other reasonable way to integrate AMC Applications with the ABAP for Cloud Development (without using an external message broker).

__PRESENT__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Mexico City 🇲🇽 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content: Registered !! can't wait to see you all, and meet all the attenders to do good connections.  🎉🎉🎉🎉

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
Hello @matthiasstegmue 

I have been asked by my managers if Lean SDT could be used as an alternative to a S/4HANA system copy ?  Wether in the context of a migration to Rise Cloud, or in the context of a system refresh, could we use lean SDT  to slice data , reducing the size of the target S/4HANA system ?  All the docuemntation seem to indicate that starting point should be ECC6, and that Lean SDT is an alternative only to system conversion to S/4HANA ? So, it is not usable within S/4HANA ?

entry.title: Project Billing making the billing documents more detailed
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have a question regarding how can i make the billing documents more detailed?

So when we you usually create a professional services project the billing item has an attached workpackage, then we go into Manage project billing and from there we can create billing documents. But that usually only has the workpackage as whole on it.

Is there a possibility to create the billing document that displays everything within said workpackage?

Thanks for the help in advance!

entry.title: Re: Bill from & ship from partner function
entry.content:
Hi,

In our scenario document output form is determined by the plant from which shipping is being done as we have billing & shipping by same plant. But now due to business requirement we have a scenario for which we have to configure billing from different plant & shipping from a different plant. 

If we maintain ship from as an text field we have challenge in determination for einvoice & eway bill under GST rules which currently are auto generated by 3rd party interface.

Best, Laura

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Readiness Check for an enhancement running into "SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in
entry.content:
@Ryan-Crosby 

Hi Ryan,

thanks for your comment!

The enhancement is very large (think >35K lines of code) and I have no clue what all is included or called. I would however be surprised if anything from that namespace were actively used or called. And even if it's called it should simply be ignored, shouldn't it?

I just tried with another much smaller enhancement for SAPMV50A and it shows the same check failure.

entry.title: Create Advanced Return on Sales/Purchase Tax without Profit Center
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our customer is running SAP Cloud Public edition and will be using "Create Advanced Return on Sales/Purchase Tax" for reebooking of the VAT from input/output VAT to VAT reconciliation. It seems like the standard process when we run this program is that the reeboking is posted with several lines depending on different Profit Centers. This approach will result in the customer getting a large number of transaction lines in theire accounting, which are unnecessary. Is there a way for the program to avoid posting the entries at the transaction level? 

Kind regards, Sanne

entry.title: Re: Altenative To where used list
entry.content: Did you try to browse with SE163[N]  tables such as D010TAB or CROSS ?

entry.title: Doubts about stock availability check functionality
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a doubt about material availability check.

The situation is the following: I have three order reservations in my MRP (MD04), and one PO Item. In the configuration of the strategy for the material availability check, I am ignoring POs so, I only take into account security stock and the available stock for this material. 

If I release the first Production order for the first reservation in y MRP, I can do it and stock availability check is not warning me because there is enough stock to fulfill the reservation. Then, If I try to release the second production order, (for which I don't have enough stock to fulfill the reservation), stock availability check is not warning me, so I can release the order without knowning that I haven't got enough stock to perform the production.

¿Is this working correctly? ¿Or this is an error? 

Thanks in advanced for your help, 

Best regards,

Patricia

entry.title: Has anyone successfully integrated SAP Document Information Extraction with SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working on a prototype using SAP Build Apps and trying to integrate the SAP Document Information Extraction (DIE) API – ideally with a real template/schema and a full end-to-end process (upload → OCR → display/store).

Unfortunately, I’m stuck. Even though I have the service key set up and a destination configured, I can’t get the full integration working properly within SAP Build Apps (or using Visual Cloud Functions / Build Process Automation).

My questions to the community:

  1. Has anyone here successfully connected DIE to SAP Build Apps?

  2. Is there a step-by-step guide available somewhere (screenshots would be amazing)?

  3. Are there any specific things to consider with templates/schemas or the authentication flow?

I’d really appreciate any advice, example code, or experiences.


Happy to connect via DM as well if it’s easier!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Issue Creating Custom Transactions ZIQ01 and ZIQ02 for Standard Transactions IQ01 and IQ02
entry.content: IMHO In the main program of those transactions, SAPMIEQ0, perform a SY-TCODE search. Then consider alternative solutions, such as variant transactions, activating controls in BAdI, or enhancements.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Readiness Check for an enhancement running into "SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in
entry.content: Since you report that it's with another I would open a message with SAP. Ughhh, I hope this doesn't mean I'll be tracking that down in our system soon because we are a couple of weeks out from that stage with our upgrade to 2023.

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Request faile...
entry.content: I am with Mio on this. Did you check that the path you provided in the credentials can be called via REST client or Postman? You might have the API exposed at a different path or it might not be available at all yet.

entry.title: Re: VFX3 Job Scheduling for Billing Release SAP
entry.content:
1. Create a variant for report SDBLBDDL (VFX3)
  2. Create a distribution list of users (SO23)
  3. Schedule the report with the distribution list as Spool List Recipient (SM36)

entry.title: Re: Bill from & ship from partner function
entry.content:
Hello,

From what you describe, my best take at it would be to make use of the copy routines used to generate the invoice.

First in these routines I would make sure that invoice item are separated by plant (segregation element zukri)

Second in the copy routine of header elements i would ask a developer to overwrite the bill from and ship from partners to match those of the corresponding plant.

entry.title: Re: Expose the custom field in SAP C4C V2
entry.content:
Hi there:

Becouse this is V2 you must go to the Monitor Message to check in the payload that the extension field are exposed. 

You can follow this steps: 

Go to User Menu->  Settings->  All Settings -> Integration -> Message Monitoring. 

then, click Outbound to view outbound messages and in the payload you can see the extension field that you extended. 

Next step is to go to the CPI to make the mapping in the integration flow replicates Sales Orders from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 to SAP S/4HANA. 

Here the link: Aqui

As you can see the Integration flow is enhanced to support customer extension from 21 feb. 

From now the behavior is similar to the C4C V1. 

Ill let you the link to the Configuration Guide- SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Integration for Sales Processes with SAP S/4HANA Aqui

And the others link Integration Packege: Aqui

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2025 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇵🇪 🇲🇽 🇨🇴 (July 25th - Aug 12th 2024
entry.content: Amazing! I Will in São Paulo. ☺️

entry.title: Re: How to Perform Partial payment Scenario in Automatic...
entry.content:
Hi @TAMS1 

Partial payments against supplier invoices.

  • You can do this with below steps -
    1. Create Payment request with F-59 against Invoice. Payment request amount should be partial amount which you want to pay.
    2. Block your original Invoice by using FB02
    3. Run F110 with required information and parameters.  Check if Payment request is selected in the proposal or not. It should be selected so you can make partial payment against the same.
    4. Remove payment block from the original invoice.
    5. Run F110 for making payment against original invoice. Remaining balance amount will be paid.

Advance payments tied to specific purchase orders.

  • Configure Special GL indicator in FBKP for advance payment and assign same in FBZP.
  • Create payment request by using F-47 . It will create advance payment open item.
  • Run F110 to make payment for advance document.
  • Later on when original invoice is created, clear it against advance payment document.
  • Clearing specific partial amounts against individual supplier invoices.
    • Mentioned in first part
  • Holding a portion of invoice payments for a certain period before later clearing them against the same invoice.
    • You can do this with residual payment but residual payment cant be done with F110. You can do with Manual payment F-53

Given full information. I hope its clear.

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am looking for possibilities in the integration of S/4HANA Public Cloud and Central Finance. According to the newest SAP Help updates 2502 I can replicate :

  • Replication and initial load of FI/CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of CO documents

  • Replication and initial load of cost objects

  • Comparison reports

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/adb033afc0464aafbdaf3060e08a4d7c.html

This blog also points to the scope item 1W4. When checking out the scope item this doesn't reflect the whole replication but only supplier invoices and clearing processes - looking like intercompany clearing processes. 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1W4?region=DE

Also I found all the restrictions applying to the connection: 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3398470

But this is neither stating what is actually possible. 

Does someone has any experience whether we can integrate the Public Cloud System with CFIN for Data Replication looking at FI/CO Documents to use CFIN as "System-of-Record"?

Thanks a lot 

Lena

entry.title: Re: Cant Cancel or Post TO
entry.content: how did you deleted the TO ? from which tables ?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Readiness Check for an enhancement running in...
entry.content:
Does a namespace entry exists in table TRNSPACE for /0SJ1P/?

I do not remember what solved our problem. Maybe in our case the namespace was missing and we simply added the entry.

Sorry, I am not sure anymore.

Maybe you will need to clear the columns SSCRFLAG and SAPFLAG and set X for EDITFLAG for the mentioned namespaces in TRNSPACE and TRSNPACET. If you try this for /0SJ1P/ you will probably get an error for the next /0*-Namespace.

There is a report where all restricted namespaces are listet: SCA_DS_RESTRICTED_NAMESPACES

We also added the "missing" namespaces here, but eventually this might not work.

entry.title: Re: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (São Paulo, Brazil)
entry.content: Amazing!

entry.title: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to ask you if there is a possibility to extract list of all invoices included (e.g. from last fiscal year) in the tax payable postings. Currently for vat return we use app run statutory reports but when you move to the step for report creation and you press new run you are redirected to the old GUI app - Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax and tax payable is posted via batch session:

The posting is done per profit center and there is no link to related invoices. So do you know if there is any cds or app which stored this kind of information (invoices included in each run/post payable posting).

Thanks,

Kamil

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️
entry.content: Next time, I’d like a more challenging task at this stage.

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy,

Thanks for the detailed blog, it is really valuable. 

There is still one question I am not 100% clear. To activate SAP Joule and use it from Fiori launchpad is still mandatory to activate SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition (foundation plan or standard plan)? Is it named as a pre-requisite but I do not fully understand based on the instruction in the point 9

entry.title: Re: How to update Z fields with BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE using EXTENSION2
entry.content:
Hello Everybody, it's been a long time since this problem have been posted but i had still something that didn't worked. I resolved the problem and for those who will face it I want to complete. I did exaclty what the last message suggested but i had to do one thing more. In the structure VBKOK there is an another field which need to be flag to update custom fields. This field is UPDATE_EXTENSION_FIELDS.

So in the code of the badi implementation, after line 38 you can add :

cs_vbkok-update_extension_fields = 'X'.

entry.title: Re: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to...
entry.content: i am a SAP Support Consultant. I investigated the issue. This  Issue was getting because of in VF31 end users Retriggered Invoice output type with old dates selection layout. Thanks for your suggestions. Have a great day!

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: The support team provided a detailed explanation and workarounds in the support case ticket I had raised, which enabled me to complete the test successfully.

entry.title: Re: How to debug an error message during S/4 HANA Billing document creation(VF01)
entry.content: Thanks for sharing!!

entry.title: Re: Learn how to leverage integrated toolchain for effective ERP transformation
entry.content: Hi Team, I tried to register for the webinar using the shared registration link, but it says 'no course available. Could you please help?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Push / Messaging Channel and SAPUI5 Demo Application
entry.content:
Hi Gregor, 

Thank you for the great blog. I am working on extending your example to bridge a gap between SAPUI5 freestyle apps and the our on-prem ABAP server. When you run ABAP Push channels as a ABAP Daemon you can utilize your instantiated ABAP classes with a new SAPUI5 frontend. My use case is avoiding the RAP lifecycle so we can use our existing ABAP classes which have frequent database commits. 

I found that your approach works great but it cannot be implemented in ABAP for Cloud Development syntax due to unpermitted object (SAMC). I thought you might find my post interesting and wanted to ask you your think SAMC objects not being supported in ABAP Cloud warrents a SAP influence request?

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/abap-for-cloud-development-abap-push-channel-applications/qaq-p/14116896?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8a3Vkb3N8TUJGOVU4WE5USjA4VjJ8MTQxMTY4OTZ8S1VET1N8aEs

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Diana80 ,

Yes, it's mandatory to subscribe SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition either Foundation plan (Free) or Standard Plan ( Paid) as it's used to store navigation targets(result of FLP content exposure) and user/role assignment in the current architecture. 

Step 9 is required to have Joule ICON in S/4 HANA Fiori launchpad . However, if you're using SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition as the central entry point for the S/4 Apps as well, then you can do it simply by following  this blog. 

Best regards,

Samir

entry.title: Re: Template Allocation
entry.content:
Hi, 

Template allocation environment for cost calculation is 001.

You need to duplicate your 009 to 001 and update the additional customizing to link this template to the costing sheet.

Material cost estimate, and production order (CO01), use environment 001.

Process orders (COR1) planned cost and actual cost (CPTA/D) use environment 009.

If you try to create a process order with the material and the template is read correctly then the issue is what is stated above.

entry.title: Re: Become an Early Adopter for Joule in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @klorn_pallier  the EAC program is free of charge as written above. However, you need existing production tenants of SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud to be able to participate.

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2

How can I fix it? 

I cannot publish my new blogs until this problem is resolved. 

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2

George

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @OmkarVB ,

I will try to answer your questions. 

  1. Why we need cloud connector for this, because its not S/4 Hana On-premise system, because my fiori is running on hosted domain, will not it connect directly with that? (If mandatory, is it required to install and setup for each users who is gonna use Joule?) Cloud connector is required even for S/4 HANA Private cloud system as it's still in private network and not available over internet. Joule and Other BTP services needs to be connected through the secured tunnel. 
  2. Is it mandatory to create new subaccount or we can use same where we deployed some SAPUI5 and CAPM apps?  No, it's not mandatory to create new subaccounts. 
  3. How is pricing gets applied? As per discovery Center, its based on token but I really have confusion on how to map token and my prompt? Kindly check SAP Discovery center estimator / connect with the SAP account team. 

Best regards,

Samir

entry.title: Re: Template Allocation
entry.content:
Hi @santhoshabh 

Is Template assigned to Overhead Key and Costing sheet ?

Is Overhead Key  assigned to Overhead group  for relevant valuation area ? And same Overhead group should be assigned to Material master for the relevant Plant.

Please check this and confirm

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: AFIP Integration in CPI/CI
entry.content:
Hello @sneha_subramanyam2.

For this, it was delivered the following SAP Notes:

  • 3333490 - Prerequisite Objects for SAP Note 3338129
  • 3338129 - AR WS RG2904: New Method BAdI for BAPIs
  • 3335419 - AR WS RG2485: BAdI Method Changes for BAPIs
  • 3333489 - AR WS RG2758: New Method BAdI for BAPIs
  • 3347806 - Post Implementation Steps for SAP Note 3333489
  • 3333492 - New BAdI for BAPI BAPI_AR_WS_CONN_TEST
  • 3346396 - Post Implementation Steps for SAP Note 3333492

As explained in the documentation of SAP Notes mentioned above: 

"Disclaimer: SAP does not provide any implementation to integrate the ERP with the Integration Suite. This is considered to be consulting.  Instead,  SAP provides BAdI methods where customers may implement their own solution to create this integration."

Best Regards.

SAP ERP Central Component SAP enhancement package for SAP ERP SAP enhancement package for SAP ERP, version for SAP HANA SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: Add Curriculum Description Field as Search Criteria on Curricula Search Page in LMS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

On the LMS curriculum search page, there are several fields available as search criteria, but the "Curriculum Description" is missing.
We’ve noticed that the "Description" field is available on the Classes and Programs Search page.
We understand that this should be configured in the Search Selectors. Could you please share the SQL configuration for adding it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Retrocalculation causing tax withholding in state tha...
entry.content: The wage type settings and the tax models are what trigger tax to come out (along with BSI TaxFactory for USA).  Check the processing class of the wage type, PCL 71, against the tax model setup for residence tax.  In the payroll log, if you simulate the payroll with payroll log for the employee, scroll to the Income Tax section, you will see the call to BSI and the tax results.  This may help with your investigation.

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
@George_Yu @BaerbelWinkler @OlgaDolinskaja @christian_bartels We've addressed the issue with high priority and the developers were able to fix it. Any formatting should not break the line anymore. Tests on my end worked. Please let me know if you still have any issues. 

Best, Laura

entry.title: Re: Bin sorting in EWM
entry.content: Hi @Ajit_Routray, Thanks for response, If I want to achieve the sequence of put away as WH-EX-01-03, then WH-EX-01-01, then WH-EX-01-02, It can be achieved through sorting bins with Cross line stock put away. then what is the significance of sorting for put away? And my second and major question is what is the significance of sorting for picking activity? Thanks again for response.

entry.title: Role assignment confusion
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on SAP SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition where i have setup everything, my spaces,applciations and pages and everything is working. Until i have decided to create a new role for certain users.
In this role i have set the spaces along side with the applications yet when i assign the role for the user it's not taking an affect and Eveyone role is the one still in affect instead.

Below are the steps i performed:

  1. I created & configured the role on workzone
     

     


     

  2. I have enabled the role on Role Assignments

     

  3. I have created a new user and a new user group on CIS

  4. I have assigned the role with the user group that was created on CIS

     

  5. Then on CIS i have assigned the user group to the user


Am i missing something ?

entry.title: Re: "Hidden" Gems: 10 Underused Features in SAP SuccessFactors Core HR
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

Thank you for sharing this list. I agree with you on many of these points. Many companies aren't fully utilizing their Employee Central. One feature that is not included in the list but I am excited to explore further are the Employee Central Quick Actions which allow to do many things in less clicks (or shorter navigation path).

Cheers!!

entry.title: Re: Profit center change with KEND in Account-Based Profi...
entry.content:
Hi,

if you try to use PRCTR in KEND, the message FCO_COPA203 should pop-out.

Profit center and other fields (i.e. company code, functional area, segment) shouldn't be changed using KEND because even if you can go trough to do a rederivation, it only updates COPA tables (CE4xxxx, CE4xxxx_ACCT)  without changes to ACDOCA table.

To make changes to profit centers in already written documents you should try looking for other solutions.

The complexity increases if you use segments and document splitting alongside your profit centers.

entry.title: Re: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to...
entry.content: Vendor (master data: BP: General Data) --> has XML check that works with SOST but ankleshrajwade's solution looks good..

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/589d635467744384b6d9800bd023e43f.html?locale=en-US

Here you will find SAP Note about unableing this feature, but maybe it will also help you:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3579706/E

And here is the SAP Note refereing to adresses in Outbound Delivery, it might also give you an overwiev to the topic:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3604036/E

Hope you will find it useful!

Regards, 

Jagoda

Thank you.

entry.title: Manager User Report - Export Content Name, versus UID
entry.content: Hi, on the User Report, how can I show the content name consumed, versus the UID?

entry.title: Test Subject
entry.content: Hihihihihihi TEST

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Central Finance
entry.content:
Hi Lena,

Thank you for your detailed inquiry.

As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402/2502, the integration with Central Finance (CFIN) is supported but with significant restrictions. While the documentation and scope item 1W4 confirm selective replication capabilities—primarily FI/CO documents and limited cost objects—the integration is not yet positioned to fully support CFIN as a "System-of-Record" for S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Key constraints include:

  • Only certain document types (e.g., supplier invoices) are replicable.
  • Full CO object replication and real-time universal journal replication remain limited.
  • Functional scope does not yet match that of on-premises or Private Cloud Editions.

SAP Note 3398470 outlines current technical limitations. S/4HANA Public Cloud cannot be considered a fully supported source system for comprehensive CFIN replication scenarios.

Best regards

Chuma

entry.title: Pro-rate salaried teammates wages
entry.content: We have salaried teammates that start on Mondays and don't get paid for the entire week as the system deducts Sunday from the comp total. I have the same issue when they term. How do others get around this? I would like to hire on Monday and have the full week paid.

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: Here is the workaround I have received as a part of my support ticket..

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: In the meantime, here’s a workaround you can do upon starting the practical test: 1. Click the Full Screen icon located in the lower-right corner of the simulation window. 2. Adjust your browser’s zoom setting (setting it to 50% has helped in our testing). To begin the test, click the downward arrow next to the “Administration” tab. This will display the list of available spaces, and you may proceed from there.

entry.title: Re: Simplify the downtime-optimized System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA with Customizing on Temp Instan
entry.content:
Hello @Necronomicon 

First of all, let me make sure that we're on the same base regarding wording as many approaches might sound rather similar.
There is downtime-optimized Database Migration Option (DMO) which is an approach focusing on migrating data in uptime. It can be leveraged in combination with system upgrades, system conversions to SAP S/4HANA or for migration only.
Downtime-optimized Conversion - while automatically including downtime-optimized DMO - is an extended approach moving parts of the conversion activities to uptime.
More information on DMO: https://support.sap.com/en/tools/software-logistics-tools/software-update-manager/database-migration-option-dmo.html
More information on downtime-optimized DMO: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/dmo-downtime-optimization-by-migrating-app-tables-during-uptime/ba-p/13108040

Now coming back to the proposed project plan, this is highly individual to the project. Let me outline the cycles as proposed in the course ADM329 (which is a mandatory course for downtime-optimized Conversion):
1) Reference standard conversion of the sandbox system (as copy of production) after which the manual FIN&ML conversion is executed
2) Downtime-optimized conversion of a sandbox system (as copy of production) using transport from 1, potentially adding customizing in a new transport
3) Standard conversion of the development system (as downtime is typically not critical for this system and the Customizing differs from production)
4) Downtime-optimized (or standard) conversion of the quality assurance system (depending on how "production-like" it is) using transports from 1,2
5) Downtime-optimized Conversion as Load verification on production system - either uptime execution only or with downtime simulation on a clone using transports from 1,2 (, 4)
6) Downtime-optimized Conversion as Dress Rehearsal on production system - with downtime simulation on a clone using transports from 1,2 (,4),5 (depending on when the freeze is introduced - this is based on the risk assessment by the project)
7) Downtime-optimized Conversion on production system (Go live)using transports from 1,2 (,4),5

Of course DEV and QAS can be converted with downtime-optimized conversion, but as mentioned this would require the Customizing to fit to the Customizing of the production system.

Additionally, I'd like to mention that there is no manual import of the FIN&ML Customizing transport(s) as they need to be provided to Software Update Manager in a customer buffer.

And last but not least, please double-check with your experts on the information that there is a contractual limit to cycles in RISE context. There might be additional costs for additional cycles but there should be no general limit.

I hope this helps! May the unspeakable horrors spare your project! 😉

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content: @Laszlo_Thoma We fixed the reported issue regarding font color. If you have any further issues please let me know.

entry.title: Re: RA keys
entry.content:
Hello @AIsmail ,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, RA Keys and RA Versions are pre-delivered by SAP and cannot be configured.

  • RA Keys are system-assigned based on the revenue recognition method (Scope Item 3EJ) and appear in apps like Manage Project Settings.
  • RA Versions are used internally for valuation logic and are not exposed for configuration.

Refer to SAP Help link below

SAP Help – Event-Based Revenue Recognition (Scope Item 3EJ)

Thank you and Best regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Issue with multiple SAP Commerce Composable Storefron...
entry.content: The reason I was not able to make both b2b and b2c work together was because I had mistakenly added "https://" before the endpoint. After removing this, both b2b and b2c has started working smoothly.

entry.title: Sales office Business place wise in Billing document VF01
entry.content: Any one can advise the complete configuration to determine the business place, sales office-wise.

entry.title: Re: I want to run a job in ADT for a Custom Object created in S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Dear Colleague, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Split Budget for Merit & Adjustment Global Template
entry.content: So in my opinion, you can have a technical answer but then branch off. So for the technical answer you can have three budgets in one template, one for merit, one for adjustment and then a total (merit + adjustment). This is really straight forward. So then, you branch off into a discussion of do you need to group budgets by country? Are there different eligibility rules by country? Do planners have employees from different countries in the same form? Can money cross borders if you have employees from more than one country on your form? In any case, it is possible, however, consultants need to consider the full picture when designing the optimal solution. Therefore, the complete answer requires the answers to the follow questions.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain copy control from preliminary billing document to billing document
entry.content: Dear Colleague, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Cash Application
entry.content: Thank you - this is helpful indeed

entry.title: Bill from Gujarat and Dispatch from Rajasthan
entry.content: I have an office in Gujarat and a manufacturing plant in Rajasthan. I want to sell goods to customers, billing them from my Gujarat GSTIN (business location) while shipping the products from my Rajasthan plant. How can I set this up in SAP SD?

entry.title: Re: Pro-rate salaried teammates wages
entry.content: The main question is when does the pay period begin? The leading practice is to hire people to begin on the beginning of the pay period and the proration does not become an issue because they are salaried and will get paid the same amount whether the work Sunday or not. In any case, this is not a compensation issue. It is a payroll issue. I have added a tag so if the EC Payroll resource has a different opinion, I will defer.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain copy control from preliminary billing...
entry.content:
Hello @kyle10 

Within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, manual pricing conditions from sales orders are not retained when creating billing documents from Preliminary Billing Documents (PBDs) due to the standard pricing re-determination logic. This behaviour is expected because copy control and pricing type settings are pre-delivered and not customer-editable.

Recommended Actions:

  • Enter manual conditions in the PBD, rather than the sales order.
  • Use the Custom Logic app (BAdI: SD_BILLINGDOC_ITEM_PREPARE) to enhance billing behaviour and retain manual pricing if available.

Kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Issue with Smartedit build after upgrade to SAP Commerce 2211.37
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have been using SAP Commerce 2211.29 before. When I try to upgrade to SAP Commerce 2211.37, I am getting smartedit build errors in my console log.

     [exec] Invoking "rush build"
     [exec] ---------------------
     [exec]
     [exec] Found configuration in C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\modules\smartedit\smartedittools\rush.json
     [exec]
     [exec]
     [exec] Rush Multi-Project Build Tool 5.140.1 - https://rushjs.io
     [exec] Node.js version is 20.18.2 (LTS)
     [exec]
     [exec]
     [exec] Starting "rush build"
     [exec]
     [exec] Analyzing repo state... The Rush monorepo is not in a Git repository. Rush will proceed without incremental build support.
     [exec] DONE (0.01 seconds)
     [exec]
     [exec] Executing a maximum of 12 simultaneous processes...
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ smartedit-build ]=============================================[ 1 of 19 ]==
     [exec] "smartedit-build" did not define any work.
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ @smartedit/scripts ]==========================================[ 2 of 19 ]==
     [exec] "@smartedit/scripts" did not define any work.
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ @Smart/utils ]================================================[ 3 of 19 ]==
     [exec] Returned error code: 1"smarteditcommons" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "@smart/utils" failed to build.
     [exec] Operations failed.
     [exec]
     [exec] "smarteditmaster" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec]
     [exec] "cmscommons" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "cmssmartedit" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "smartedit" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "cmssmarteditcontainer" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "smarteditcontainer" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationcommons" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationpromotionssmartedit" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationpromotionssmarteditcommons" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationpromotionssmarteditcontainer" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationsearchsmartedit" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationsearchsmarteditcontainer" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationsmartedit" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "personalizationsmarteditcontainer" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec] "webappinjector" is blocked by "@smart/utils".
     [exec]
     [exec]
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ NO OP: 2 operations ]======================================================
     [exec]
     [exec] These operations did not define any work:
     [exec]   smartedit-build
     [exec]   @smartedit/scripts
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ BLOCKED: 16 operations ]===================================================
     [exec]
     [exec] These operations were blocked by dependencies that failed:
     [exec]   cmscommons
     [exec]   smarteditcommons
     [exec]   cmssmartedit
     [exec]   smartedit
     [exec]   cmssmarteditcontainer
     [exec]   smarteditcontainer
     [exec]   personalizationcommons
     [exec]   personalizationpromotionssmartedit
     [exec]   personalizationpromotionssmarteditcommons
     [exec]   personalizationpromotionssmarteditcontainer
     [exec]   personalizationsearchsmartedit
     [exec]   personalizationsearchsmarteditcontainer
     [exec]   personalizationsmartedit
     [exec]   personalizationsmarteditcontainer
     [exec]   smarteditmaster
     [exec]   webappinjector
     [exec]
     [exec] ==[ FAILURE: 1 operation ]=====================================================
     [exec]
     [exec] --[ FAILURE: @Smart/utils ]----------------------------------[ 4.04 seconds ]--
     [exec]
     [exec] Returned error code: 1
     [exec]
     [exec]
     [exec] rush build (4.11 seconds)

BUILD FAILED
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\build.xml:13: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\compiling.xml:95: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\compiling.xml:153: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\util.xml:13: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\compiling.xml:160: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\compiling.xml:289: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\platform\resources\ant\util.xml:142: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\modules\smartedit\smartedittools\buildcallbacks.xml:225: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\modules\npm-ancillary\npmancillary\buildcallbacks.xml:543: The following error occurred while executing this line:
C:\CXCOMCL221100U_37-70007431\hybris\bin\modules\npm-ancillary\npmancillary\buildcallbacks.xml:130: exec returned: 1

I do not have any custom smartedit extension. 

Following are my system details for installed ng versions:

Angular CLI: 19.2.6
Node: 23.6.0
Package Manager: npm 10.9.2
OS: win32 x64

 

Can you please suggest if I have missed to upgrade something, or if I need to remove anything before trying the build again.

entry.title: Re: Pro-rate salaried teammates wages
entry.content: it can vary between Mon and Sun. I-9 records need to reflect actual start date so we would want the teammate to be hired on actual first day worked
